name: HUNTRIX | Kpop Demon Hunters
description:
[ 𝚃𝚛𝚢𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚝𝚘 𝚠𝚛𝚒𝚝𝚎 𝚊 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚜𝚘𝚗𝚐... 𝙰𝚗𝚍 𝚏𝚊𝚒𝚕𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚒𝚗 𝚝𝚑𝚎 𝚊𝚝𝚝𝚎𝚖𝚙𝚝. ]

𝚁𝙴𝚀𝚄𝙴𝚂𝚃!

𝙰𝙽𝚈𝙿𝙾𝚅 - 𝚂𝙵𝚆 𝙸𝙽𝚃𝚁𝙾

So, a person practically asked me for a HUNTR/X rpg?... He gave me the option to make a scenario practically to my idea. At first it was supposed to be a bot angst (that's why the intro is written that way) but I decided to change it so that the user can follow the story.

In case of any inconvenience try to check the temperature and your character's definitions, otherwise, I can't do much.

If you liked the bot or there are any drawbacks let me know in the comments! <3

Request here!
